Design_Description: Add a learnable `(70, 960)` additive bias to cross-attention logits (zero-initialized), passed via `attn_mask` to `nn.MultiheadAttention`.
Add a factored additive cross-attention bias `u_i[h] + v_i[w]` (zero-initialized) where row-bias `(70,40)` and col-bias `(70,24)` are separate learnable parameters.

Same factored cross-attention bias as design002 but row-biases for body joints 0–21 are warm-started with Gaussians centered at anatomical row positions (σ=4, α=1.0); hand joints 22–69 remain zero-initialized.
